gates.name: healthy_baseline
gates.intent: The control group should stay inside the inference SLO.

checks.message: baseline cache miss rate is low

gates.name: cache_miss_storm_detected
gates.intent: Cache miss storms should be classified as latency incidents, not model incidents.

checks.message: cache miss storm has no synthetic upstream errors
cache miss rate is high enough to explain latency
cache miss storm breaches the latency SLO

gates.name: dependency_timeout_detected
gates.intent: Feature-store timeouts should be visible as dependency-driven errors.

checks.message: dependency timeout error rate is material
dependency timeout p95 latency is clearly degraded

gates.name: rollout_regression_detected
gates.intent: A bad service version should be separable from baseline traffic.

checks.message: rollout regression is tied to service.version=v2
rollout regression breaches the latency SLO

gates.name: collector_queue_pressure_detected
gates.intent: Telemetry delivery loss should be detected separately from user-facing app failure.

checks.message: collector pressure has no app errors
telemetry loss rate is high enough to trigger delivery investigation
collector queue pressure is classified as high
application latency remains inside the collector-pressure ceiling

resume_claim: Runnable GKE AI inference reliability lab with incident replay, configurable SLO gates, Kubernetes metadata, and collector delivery proof.
